title: The Tontatta Are Captured
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the tontatta are captured, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Watch out!! He's one of the family's elite officers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He ate the "Iski Ishi No mi"... and became a "Rock Assimilation Man"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So it seems like he's not just an ordinary "stone man"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He can fuse with any stone he touches. So now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You could say that this entire stone palace....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: The air blast has opened up a hole in the stands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: One of the "10 Titan Captains" who back him up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Don't involve the audience in IS this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: there it is!! the fighting fish with the devil fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: If I could just... the chains...

summary: The Tontatta Are Captured focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.
